name: novel-skills
description: Codex plugin for structured Chinese fiction writing workflows.

interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin focused on Chinese fiction workflows: market scan, deconstruction, outlining, drafting, revision, commercial writing, and anti-AI polish.
defaultPrompt: Use novel-studio to route my current fiction task.
Help me open a new novel project and plan the first volume.
Revise this chapter for logic, detail, and payoff discipline.
